name: TOOEI FUYOO NO JUTSU (FLOATING REFLECTION NO JUTSU)

description.value:
The user bond a small mirror by Advanced Seal: Kagami Shasai. The character controls a flying mirror which he uses to spy and scout around. The mirror can see 150 feet forward (standard vision only). While the eye remains fragile, it is very diminutive and difficult to spot. The floating mirror is a Fine construct, about the size of a child's balled fist, has 1d6 hit points, a Defense of 18 (+8 size bonus), flies at a 30 feet with perfect maneuverability and has a +16 Hide modifier. It carries the same Spot modifier as the user and is subject to Genjutsus, darkness, fog and any other factor that would affect his ability to receive visual information about his surroundings. The user can command the mirror freely using mental directions, as the mirror and the user share the same mind and thoughts. If the mirror leaves the technique's range or is destroyed, it is instantly destroyed and leaves absolutely no trace of its presence. While the user maintains this technique, he himself (but not the mirror) suffers a -4 penalty to spot checks.

Material Focus -One small mirror or Expendable Components if using Ninpo Gisuikyoo no Jutsu: A Small puddle of water.

Requires: Mirror Arts (f), Advanced Seal: Kagami Shasai (t)

Effect: One floating mirror
